purpose: Per-job map from testdiet mission to the Beads records that own the durable product contracts the worker must honor (architecture decisions persisted by PR #2947 and later notes). Paste the job's line into the dispatch chat alongside the prompt; workers read the full current records in the attached snapshot's .beads/issues.jsonl. Wrong-or-stale anchors are worse than none: check-dispatch.py validates these ids against the snapshot before launch.

testdiet-01.note: Query-transaction semantics (.9), bounded execution (.1), adapter migration (.9.1), read-algebra doctrine (4p1).

testdiet-02.note: Service lifecycle contract (avmq), production-valid daemon harnesses (enj7), fts debt-feeder gap (5vbs), reservation/lease semantics shared with convergence (0puw, qs0a).

testdiet-03.note: Source-replay equivalence proof (9rw0), derived-tier transition protocol (b5l), exactly-resumable rebuild (b5l.1).

testdiet-04.note: One monotonic DerivationKey value shared across embedding and FTS freshness; storage-neutral, never a universal table.

testdiet-05.note: Interruption/cancellation/budget mechanics (.1); budgeted-page and continuation semantics (.9).

testdiet-07.note: Cross-surface parity and query-law falsification (yeq.3); Query x Projection x Render as sole read algebra (4p1).

testdiet-08.note: OriginSpec admission/fidelity contract; no per-origin ChatGPT bead — brief + architecture docs carry the specifics.

testdiet-09.note: OriginSpec family plus lineage-write laws (866e) and subagent-vs-main compaction distinction (4ts.3) — Claude Code's distinctive axes.

testdiet-10.note: OriginSpec family; no per-origin Claude-web bead.

testdiet-11.note: OriginSpec family; Codex title enrichment (ih67) touches the same ingest surface — coordination hotspot if that lane is active.

testdiet-12.note: OriginSpec family; dogfood-2 found dead detector code for aistudio-drive — check current source before assuming the detector shape.

testdiet-13.note: DSL nesting-depth guard is adjacent; no single owner for output/schema injection safety — treat live source + security tests as authority.

testdiet-14.note: load_polylogue_config as sole resolver (fd2s), config epic (9gh1), nested-table merge bug (cxlk), typed tier map/ArchiveLocation (ovme).

testdiet-15.note: Production time-authority audit (896y) is the local evidence base. Test-side authority: tests/infra/frozen_clock.py, docs/plans/test-clock-allowlist.yaml, and the verify-test-clock-hygiene lint.

testdiet-16.note: DefinitionClosureGraph kernel (9e5.31.1) consuming the DeclarationSpec foundation (o21.1). Parent epic 9e5.31 may be in progress locally — coordination hotspot.
